form.formComment: Second-up. First start 6th of 11 at Le Touquet on August 17 over 1300m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Canena carrying 56.5kg at $13. Went for a spell before returning ran last of 9 at Compiegne on March 27 over 1600m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Azure Dragon carrying 58kg at $77. Not going well enough.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, 7th of 9 at Saint-Cloud on March 10 over 1400m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Acary with 56kg at $19. Second-up 2nd of 7 at this track on March 23 over 1300m, 2 len behind Homere with 58kg at $30. Progressing well and is one of the major hopes.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, 9th of 12 at this track on March 23 over 1300m, 7 len behind Charming Zel carrying 56kg at $26. Needs to lift.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Jumped at long odds at debut, 9th of 12 at this track on March 23 over 1300m, 7 len behind Charming Zel carrying 56kg at $26. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 3rd of 12 at this track on March 23 over 1300m, 1.75 len behind Charming Zel carrying 58kg at $3.50. Before that 3rd of 10 at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather on January 20 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Eostre with 56.5kg at $1.80. Overdue and gets her chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Form hard to fault. At the latest run 3rd of 12 at this track on March 23 over 1300m, 1.75 len behind Charming Zel carrying 58kg at $3.50. Before that 3rd of 10 at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather on January 20 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Eostre with 56.5kg at $1.80. Overdue and gets her chance.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 2nd of 12 at this track on March 23 over 1300m, 1.3 len behind Charming Zel with 58kg at $4.60. Previously second-up 3rd of 11 at Deauville All Weather on December 18 over 1300m, 2.5 len behind Elima with 58kg at $6.70. Can only be further improved and expected to go on with it.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Second-up. First-up after three months 2nd of 12 at this track on March 23 over 1300m, 1.3 len behind Charming Zel with 58kg at $4.60. form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign third of 7 at Deauville All Weather in the LR November 2 over 1400m, 2.75 len behind Cielo Di Roma carrying 55.5kg at $13. On debut second of 12 at Clairefontaine August 2 over 1600m, a head behind Debrouillarde with 56kg at $11. Can go on to better things this campaign.
